content: MO2 uses USVFS (user-space virtual FS, API hooking) to present game a virtual merged data dir without touching real files; mods in separate dirs, no real overwrites, vanilla install stays clean. Profiles: independent mod combos, load orders, INI, optional per-profile saves. Overwrite directory captures runtime-generated files, global across profiles. USVFS is Windows-specific (process-local hooks) — NOT viable on Linux/Proton directly.
